summary: First set sounds good with strong bass, second set gets a bit muddier – overall recording quality is mixed.
review: The reviewer notes that the first set has clear sound and excellent bass response, while the second set sounds noticeably muddier. No specific performance issues are mentioned beyond the tonal shift, leaving the musical impression fairly neutral.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it praises bass on the first set but calls the second set muddy, giving a modest overall impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First set clear with great bass response; second set described as muddier, indicating inconsistent clarity across the show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The reviewer feels the first set sounds good while the second set suffers from a murkier mix, suggesting uneven sonic presentation rather than performance issues.

band_member_comments.Phil: Great bass response noted on the first set.
